violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No employee certified in food safety management was on-site during inspection. Establishment does have an active FMC. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

An open employees' beverage container (coffee mug) was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

Soap was not available at one of the hand-washing sinks in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. A sponge was observed in another kitchen hand-washing sink. Hand-washing sinks must only be used for hand-washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

Raw beef was observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cabbage) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from (below) raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

Foods are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory is not provided (on the printed menu) to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026
A couple of spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2026

Thermometer is lacking in the walk-in cooler. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2026

Soap and paper towels were not available at the hand-washing sink in the bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of soap and paper towels at all times. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Service began at the time of inspection. 3-bay sink must be used to sanitize dishes/cookware until dishwasher is reaching the correct chlorine concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

Lamb was observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

Salad products located at the cold buffet observed with temperatures 44 - 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Products had been placed in the buffet unit less than 2 hours prior to inspection. Ice placed under the containers and unit is to be serviced to achieve/maintain consistent temperatures at/below 41 degrees F. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024

Doors to the outside, located at the side of the building and at receiving, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2024
Faucets at the 3-bay sink and the mop sink observed to be leaking. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
